type_error_policy: Pycairo verifies that its Python .pyi namespace covers runtime names. MoonBit generates pkg.generated.mbti from checked source, and the mandatory API inventory gate compares that interface with every portable pycairo entry.

test_typing.adaptation: The mandatory API inventory gate replaces Python stub execution: it parses cairo/__init__.pyi and requires each portable public entry to map to src/pkg.generated.mbti or an explicit product decision.
